notes: All 7 sites returned HTTP 403 Forbidden from the WebFetch tool. This is consistent with CDN/bot-protection (e.g. Cloudflare) blocking the automated checker user agent — not indicative of actual site downtime. Actual availability for real users could not be confirmed. SSL expiry checks also failed (openssl unavailable in this environment). Manual verification recommended if concerned.
